title: Switching Accounts in Android Mobile App
excerpt: As a person who works from home, flexibility in my work is really important. And there is an inevitable mixing of personal life and work life. For that reason, it would be immensely helpful for me to be able to switch be…

posts.author: YesTomSzymanski (Tom Szymanski)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a person who works from home, flexibility in my work is really important. And there is an inevitable mixing of personal life and work life. For that reason, it would be immensely helpful for me to be able to switch between my personal and work Monday accounts more easily!

The functionality exists in the browser version. I see no reason why it would not for the Mobile. It would allow me to be more productive in all aspects of my life without the interruptions for magic emails or spotty QR Code log ins.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @YesTomSzymanski!

Switching accounts is currently supported on iOS however from the sounds of things, you’re not working from a iOS device?

posts.author: GoGreenServices (Geoff Clay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Being able to do this on Android is essential for me to expand my usage of Monday.com. I am on the go constantly and I don’t always take my laptop with me. I can’t imagine why this has only been rolled out on iOS.

Most of the people I work with are on Android phones and technology, tablets and Chromebooks etc.

Is there any timeline for support for Android getting added?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Geoff, thank you for your feedback.

I understand where you’re coming from and raised this with our internal mobile team. I can say that this is a feature on our roadmap, and the team plan to work on this quarter. I will provide more concrete information on release timelines, when it’s shared with me. Thank you for your patience

posts.author: Attila (Attila Preszter)
posts.cookedHtml: This is hugely importnat for me as well. I have three Monday accounts for three separate companies and I can only use it on mobile for one.

posts.author: rsjkeeley (Richard )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaT did the team manage to work on this last quarter? I’m now using Monday for 3 companies and whilst I can switch seamlessly on desktop, I can’t on Android (yet iOS users can). Other apps such as Jira and Slack have this, so if Monday can join the party soon, it will make current clients very happy (and likely bring news ones)!

posts.author: Ben_psi (Ben Liu)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d also like to add my vote on this. As a monday certified partner and android user. I can not switch account between 2 companies that I managed which one uses work management, and the other uses CRM

posts.author: gsl12thscouts (Iain stanley)
posts.cookedHtml: Please can I also vote for this

posts.author: Aleksei (Aleksei)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Bianca Taylor, by any chance had the team worked on this in the past years? I currently have to log-in and log-out a few times each day to switch between accounts. That is VERY inconvenient. Many other apps support multiple accounts, but Monday stays the same and not improving. And, honestly, it looks like your company prioritizes iPhone users a lot. The feature for iPhone has been there for how long - 2-3 years? And still nothing for Android.
